items.title: ID copies
items.detail: Keep printed or digital copies of identification ready to grab.

items.title: Insurance documents
items.detail: Store policy numbers and claim contacts in the bag.

items.title: Emergency contacts
items.detail: Keep a printed contact list in case the phone is flat.

items.title: USB backup of documents
items.detail: Save key files offline on an encrypted drive or spare phone.

items.title: Waterproof document pouch
items.detail: Protect papers from rain, ash, and floodwater.

items.title: First aid kit
items.detail: Pack a compact kit with dressings, gloves, and antiseptic.

items.title: Prescription medications
items.detail: Store a ready-to-grab supply with labels intact.

items.title: Inhalers or medical devices
items.detail: Include chargers, spacers, and backup consumables if needed.

items.title: Pain relief tablets
items.detail: Keep simple over-the-counter treatment sealed and current.

items.title: P2 masks
items.detail: Reduce smoke exposure during bushfire and ember events.

items.title: Water bottles
items.detail: Keep ready-to-drink bottles for immediate departure.

items.title: Water purification tablets
items.detail: Carry a backup treatment option if clean water runs short.

items.title: Collapsible water container
items.detail: Useful for topping up when you reach a safe water source.

items.title: Vehicle water cache
items.detail: Stage extra bottles for long drives or remote detours.

items.title: Energy bars
items.detail: Pack shelf-stable food that needs no preparation.

items.title: Canned food
items.detail: Choose simple meals that travel well and tolerate heat.

items.title: Portable stove
items.detail: Only pack if you can carry it safely and have fuel ready.

items.title: Utensils and can opener
items.detail: Keep eating tools with the food section so nothing is missed.

items.title: Change of clothes
items.detail: Pack one weather-appropriate set for each person using the bag.

items.title: Sturdy shoes
items.detail: Use enclosed shoes suitable for debris and uneven ground.

items.title: Rain layer
items.detail: Add a compact waterproof shell for wind and driving rain.

items.title: Rubber boots
items.detail: Useful when roads, verges, and evacuation points are wet or muddy.

items.title: Multitool
items.detail: Pack a compact tool for minor fixes and opening gear.

items.title: Emergency whistle
items.detail: Use a whistle to signal without draining your voice.

items.title: Duct tape
items.detail: Useful for quick sealing, bundling, and temporary fixes.

items.title: Rope
items.detail: Carry a short durable length for bundling or securing loose items.

items.title: Fire blanket
items.detail: Useful for ember attack and small fire suppression on the way out.

items.title: Battery radio
items.detail: Keep an offline news source for official warnings and updates.

items.title: Phone power bank
items.detail: Charge it before high-risk days and store it with cables.

items.title: Charging cables
items.detail: Include the cables that match every device you rely on.

items.title: Laminated contact card
items.detail: Carry a small card with key names, numbers, and meeting points.

items.title: Torch
items.detail: Use a dedicated torch instead of relying only on the phone light.

items.title: Headlamp
items.detail: Keeps hands free when loading the car or moving in smoke or rain.

items.title: Extra batteries
items.detail: Store the battery size required for your torch and radio.

items.title: USB car charger
items.detail: Top up phones and lights during evacuation travel.

evacuation_checklist.title: Grab go bag
evacuation_checklist.detail: Take the packed bag staged near the main exit.

evacuation_checklist.title: Take document pouch
evacuation_checklist.detail: Check the waterproof document pouch is in the bag or in hand.

evacuation_checklist.title: Turn off gas
evacuation_checklist.detail: Only if it is safe and you know the shutoff procedure.

evacuation_checklist.title: Turn off electricity
evacuation_checklist.detail: Shut down power if authorities or your household plan require it.

evacuation_checklist.title: Secure pets
evacuation_checklist.detail: Load carriers, leads, food, and medications before leaving.

evacuation_checklist.title: Lock house
evacuation_checklist.detail: Do a final exit check and lock the property if time allows.

evacuation_checklist.title: Leave immediately
evacuation_checklist.detail: Use the planned route and avoid stopping unless conditions force it.
